entity.summary: Onchain rebalancing protocol and decentralized exchange architecture launched on Ethereum in January 2023 and later deployed across additional EVM networks.
entity.notes: HEI uses the Ethereum launch date of 2023-01-24. Current first-party documentation describes Antfarm as an onchain rebalancing protocol built with a decentralized-exchange architecture and lists supported EVM deployments.

events.title: Antfarm launched on Ethereum
events.description: Antfarm opened its onchain rebalancing and exchange protocol on Ethereum.
events.notes: The exact launch date is independently reported and aligned with the project's documented Ethereum deployment history.

evidence.title: Antfarm introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Antfarm as an onchain rebalancing protocol using DEX architecture and describes its supported networks.

evidence.title: Antfarm Finance launches on Ethereum
evidence.notes: Contemporary report provides the exact Ethereum launch date.

evidence.title: Antfarm Ethereum contracts
evidence.notes: Current first-party contract registry confirms the Ethereum deployment and active protocol identity.
